{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Wire event status update handler in crm-bento-grid.tsx","description":"File: `/Users/ashleytower/mtl-craft-cocktails-ai/components/crm-bento-grid.tsx`

Two TODOs:
1. Line 664: Check if linked event is in 48hrs
2. Line 1069: Wire to actual status update handler for event status changes

The status update handler should:
- Call `supabase.from('events').update({ status: newStatus }).eq('id', eventId)`
- Optimistically update the UI
- Log the action via `logAction()` from actionLogService
- Handle error with toast/notification

Look at how other event updates are done in the codebase (check `useEventSelection.ts`, `App.tsx` voice handlers) to match patterns.

Write a test for the status update handler before implementing. Check the events table schema from migrations to confirm the status column and valid values.","assignedBy":"event-wirer","timestamp":"2026-02-07T02:28:46.808Z"}
